# Step 1 — Purchase Request List

> The main management screen for the Creator. Lists all purchase requests the logged-in user can see, with search, filter, and the entry point for creating new PRs.

![PR List Screen](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.1 Access Path

```
Dashboard → Procurement (left sidebar) → Purchase Request
```

Or navigate directly: `/procurement/purchase-request`

**Permissions required:** Any authenticated user with Procurement access.

---

## 1.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> create["2. Create PR"]
    list --> tmpl["3. Create from Template"]
    create --> detail["4. PR Detail"]
    tmpl --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["5. Edit PR"]
    edit --> submit["6. Submit Confirmation"]
    submit --> inprog(["Submitted - In Progress"])
    inprog -->|Returned| returned["7. Returned PR"]
    returned --> edit
    detail -->|Delete| del["8. Delete Confirmation"]
    del --> list
    style list fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.3 Page Layout

The page has three zones:

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  HEADER BAR  [← Procurement] Purchase Request  [Export][Print][Add Request]  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  SEARCH + TABS: [My pending] [All Documents]  [All Stage ▼] [Filter]          │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  TABLE: columns + rows + pagination                   │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 1.4 List Columns

| Column | Description | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| PR No. | Auto-generated reference, format `PR[YYMM][NNNN]` e.g. `PR20260400031` | Clickable — opens PR Detail |
| Date | PR creation date | Format: YYYY-MM-DD |
| Type | PR type (General / Asset / Market List) | Set at creation |
| Stage | Current workflow stage name | e.g. "Create Request", "HOD", "Purchase" |
| Requestor | Name of the user who created the PR | |
| Description | Free-text description from PR header | May be blank |
| Department | Creator's department | |
| Total Amount | Sum of all item amounts | 2 decimal places |
| Currency | Transaction currency | e.g. THB |
| Status | Current status badge | See §1.7 |
| Actions | Row-level action buttons | |

---

## 1.5 Tabs

| Tab | Shows |
|-----|-------|
| **My pending** | PRs created by the logged-in user in any non-terminal status |
| **All Documents** | All PRs visible to the user (own + department) |

The active tab is highlighted in blue. Default on first load: **My pending**.

---

## 1.6 Search & Filter

**Search bar** (top-left): filters by PR No., Description, or Requestor name. Real-time as you type.

**All Stage** dropdown: filters by workflow stage. Options seen: All Stage + individual stage names.

**Filter panel** (right slide-in):

![Filter Panel](data:image/png;base64,)

| Filter Field | Type | Description |
|-------------|------|-------------|
| Pick a date range | Date range picker | Filter by PR creation date |
| Status | Checkbox list | Draft, In Progress, Approved, Void, Completed |
| Stage | Checkbox list | Workflow stage names |
| Workflow | Checkbox list | General, Asset, Market List |
| Department | Checkbox list | Department names |
| Requester | Search + checkbox | Filter by creator name |

Filter panel opens with the **Filter** button (top-right of table). Closes with **Escape** or clicking outside.

---

## 1.7 Status Badges

| Status | Badge Colour | Meaning |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `DRAFT` | Grey | Saved but not submitted |
| `INPROGRESS` | Amber/Orange | Submitted, moving through approvals |
| `APPROVED` | Green | All approvals complete |
| `VOID` | Red | Rejected/denied |
| `COMPLETED` | Blue | Converted to PO |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** The UI renders the status as `INPROGRESS` (single word, no space/hyphen). The BRD specifies `In-progress`. Documents and API references should use the UI value `INPROGRESS`.

---

## 1.8 Header Action Buttons

| Button | Color | Always Available | Purpose / Use Case | Behaviour |
|--------|-------|------------------|--------------------|-----------|
| **Export** | Outline | ✅ | Download the current filtered list for reporting or record-keeping | Downloads the current list as CSV/Excel (exact format TBC) |
| **Print** | Outline | ✅ | Print the current filtered list for physical review or sign-off | Opens browser print dialog for the current list |
| **Add Request** | Blue/Primary | ✅ | Start a new Purchase Request — from scratch or from a saved template | Opens the Add Request modal → see §1.9 |

---

## 1.9 Add Request Dialog

Clicking **Add Request** opens a modal:

![Add Request Dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Blank PR** | Creates a new empty PR form at `/procurement/purchase-request/new` |
| **PR Template** | Opens a template selector; pre-fills the form with saved items |

Clicking either option navigates to the Create PR Form (Step 2).

---

## 1.10 Row Click Navigation

Clicking a **PR No.** link in the table navigates to the full PR Detail page at `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` (Step 3).

---

## 1.11 Pagination

| Control | Behaviour |
|---------|-----------|
| Rows per page | Dropdown (options: 10, 25, 50); default 10 |
| Page navigation | Previous / Next buttons; current page indicator |
| Total count | "Showing X–Y of Z" label |

---

## 1.12 Edge Cases & Error States

| # | Scenario | System Behaviour |
|---|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | No PRs exist for user | Empty state: "No items added yet. Start by adding items to this purchase request." with Add Request button |
| 2 | Search returns no results | Empty table with "No results" message |
| 3 | Network error loading list | Loading skeleton → error toast (exact message TBC) |
| 4 | User has no Procurement access | Redirected or access-denied page (TBC) |
| 5 | Filter applied with no matching results | Empty table; filter badge shows active filter count |
| 6 | Session expired mid-page | Redirect to `/login` |

---

## 1.13 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | The **My Pending** tab (default) shows PRs with statuses: Draft, In Progress. Purpose: quick access to items needing Creator action. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-02 | The **All Documents** tab shows all PRs the user has permission to view based on role and department. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-03 | Status filter is only available when **All Documents** is active. Stage filter is only available when **My Pending** is active. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-04 | List must load within 2 seconds for up to 1,000 records. Filters apply within 500ms. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-05 | List auto-refreshes in real-time — no manual Refresh button. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-06 | Row click opens PR Detail. There is no separate "Edit" or "Modify" button in the row. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-07 | Export (Excel/CSV) must include all filtered data with all visible columns. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-08 | Default rows per page: 10 (UI observed); BRD specifies 20. Configurable: 10, 20, 50, 100. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-09 | Sort order persists for the user's session. | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-10 | Status badges are colour-coded: Green=Approved, Blue=Completed, Amber=In-progress, Red=Void, Grey=Draft. | FR-PR-006 |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-08):** BRD default rows per page is 20; UI shows 10. Verify with dev team.

---

## 1.14 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click **Add Request** → Blank PR | Step 2 — Create PR Form (`/procurement/purchase-request/new`) |
| Click **Add Request** → PR Template | Step 2 — Create PR Form (pre-filled) |
| Click PR No. link | Step 4 — PR Detail (`/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid`) |
| Click sidebar **My Approval** | My Approval page |
| Click breadcrumb **Procurement** | Procurement Landing |
